name: gn-monorepo

scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e

description: Run test:api for backend only, test:e2e for E2E (requires backend on :4000). Use test:watch:api for API tests on every change.
